scripts.test: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' -v
scripts.test:guardrails: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests.test_sync_jobs tests.test_sync_job_acquire_guardrail tests.test_force_refresh_parquet tests.test_summary_activity_type_filter tests.test_sleep_and_hrv_sync -v
